title: Column type change via direct ALTER on large table — full rewrite with exclusive lock
expected_feedback: Standard: ALTER TABLE MODIFY column type from NUMBER(10,2) to NUMBER(12,4) on 25M rows requires a full table rewrite with exclusive lock. This blocks all DML for the duration. On Enterprise Edition, use DBMS_REDEFINITION for online restructuring instead.
violated_rule: Large table restructuring uses DBMS_REDEFINITION or CTAS
